name: The Fall of Jerusalem
notes: Jerusalem's destruction told three times. 2 Kings 25 and Jeremiah 52 are nearly verbatim and are aligned verse by verse; where Kings compresses into one verse what Jeremiah splits into two (the king's sons and eyes, the pillar and its chapiter), the single Kings verse links to both. The briefer 2 Chronicles 36 summary is attached to the matching beats. Jeremiah's added matter (Zedekiah's reign 52:1-3, the ninety-six pomegranates 52:23, the deportation tallies 52:28-30) and Chronicles' indiscriminate slaughter (36:17) and seventy-years note (36:21) have no parallel and stay unlinked.
